Home › About Us

About Ekan Solutions Inc.

A Maryland-based enterprise IT services firm delivering innovative, secure, and scalable technology solutions since 2008 — trusted by government and commercial organizations nationwide.

Explore Our Services Get In Touch
OUR STORY

Who We Are

Ekan Solutions Inc. is an enterprise IT services firm headquartered in Maryland, serving clients across the United States. Founded in 2008, we have grown from a boutique technology consulting group into a full-service partner delivering mission-critical solutions for government, commercial, and non-profit organizations.

Our team of certified professionals brings deep expertise across cybersecurity, cloud architecture, full-stack development, project management, quality assurance, and artificial intelligence. We combine technical excellence with strategic insight to deliver solutions that are secure, scalable, and aligned with your business objectives.

From our offices in Woodbine and Columbia, Maryland, we serve clients coast-to-coast — bringing the reliability of an enterprise partner with the agility and responsiveness of a dedicated team that truly cares about your success.

AWS Certified PMP Certified ISO 27001 CISSP CMMI Level 3
50+ Projects Delivered
30+ Clients Served
10+ Years Experience
99% Client Satisfaction
PURPOSE & DIRECTION

Mission & Vision

The principles that guide every engagement, every decision, and every line of code we write.

Our Mission

To empower organizations with innovative, secure, and scalable technology solutions that drive business growth and competitive advantage. We partner with our clients to deeply understand their unique challenges and deliver results that create lasting, measurable value — on time and within budget.

Our Vision

To be the most trusted technology partner for enterprises seeking digital transformation — recognized for excellence, integrity, and measurable results. We aspire to set the standard for IT services through continuous innovation, deep expertise, and a relentless commitment to client-centric delivery across every engagement.

WHAT WE STAND FOR

Our Core Values

The beliefs that define our culture and shape every client engagement, from strategy through delivery.

Integrity

Honest, transparent partnerships built on accountability and ethical conduct in every interaction with our clients and partners.

Excellence

Delivering the highest quality in every engagement. We hold ourselves to rigorous standards so clients always receive best-in-class solutions.

Innovation

Embracing emerging technologies to solve complex business challenges. We continuously research new tools and methodologies to keep clients ahead.

Collaboration

Working as a unified team with our clients. We integrate seamlessly with your organization to deliver shared outcomes and long-term relationships.

Client Focus

Every solution is purpose-built around your unique goals. We listen deeply, understand your business context, and tailor our approach accordingly.

Agility

Adapting quickly to evolving requirements and market conditions. Our iterative, sprint-based delivery ensures speed and flexibility at every stage.

SECTORS WE SERVE

Industries We Serve

Deep domain expertise across the sectors that depend on technology to operate, compete, and grow.

Healthcare

HIPAA-compliant systems, EHR integration, and secure patient data management for modern healthcare providers.

Read More →

Financial Services

Secure banking platforms, regulatory compliance, and real-time fraud detection for fintech organizations.

Read More →

Government & Public Sector

FedRAMP-authorized cloud solutions, FISMA compliance, and digital modernization for public sector agencies.

Read More →

Retail & E-Commerce

Scalable storefronts, inventory systems, and customer analytics platforms for modern retail businesses.

Read More →

Manufacturing & Industry

IoT integration, ERP systems, supply chain optimization, and predictive maintenance for industry leaders.

Read More →

Education & EdTech

LMS platforms, student data systems, remote learning infrastructure, and campus security solutions.

Read More →

Technology

Software product engineering, platform migrations, and DevOps acceleration for tech-forward companies.

Read More →

Energy & Utilities

SCADA systems, OT/IT convergence, and regulatory compliance for energy and utility infrastructure.

Read More →

Our Promise to You

"Every engagement begins with understanding your goals. We commit to delivering solutions that are secure, scalable, and precisely aligned with your business objectives — on time, within budget, and with transparency at every step."
— The Ekan Solutions Leadership Team

Ready to Work With Us?

Let's discuss how Ekan Solutions can help drive your next technology initiative.
